{{CargoRelic
|name=Aged Beastnip
|class_id=20980
|rank=Green
|affct=FAME
|source=
|description=Beastnip exhibits a unique allure to animals, stimulating specialized receptors in their brains to induce euphoric responses characterized by heightened excitement and delight. When naturally air-dried and properly aged, the fragrance of matured beastmint intensifies while maintaining prolonged potency.
|fame=29
|art=15
|fth=15
|civ=17
|tech=14
|ss1=Per 100 catalysis, Snail ATK +3<br>Catalysis: 5000/5000
|ss2=Per 100 catalysis, Snail ATK +4<br>Catalysis: 5000/5000
|ss3=Per 100 catalysis, Snail ATK +5<br>Catalysis: 5000/5000
|ss4=Per 100 catalysis, Snail ATK +5<br>Catalysis: 5000/5000
|ss7=Per 100 catalysis, Snail ATK +5<br>Catalysis: 5000/5000<br> (Awakened)
}}
